apiKeyModal.title: API Key Required
apiKeyModal.description: Enter your API key for {{providerName}} to continue.
apiKeyModal.securityNoteSession: Key will be cleared when you close the browser tab.
apiKeyModal.securityNoteOnce: Key will be used once and not stored.
badgeInfo.secure.title: Secure Provider
badgeInfo.secure.desc: This model runs on a provider that either doesn't store your data or operates in Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs). Your conversations are more private and secure.
badgeInfo.vision.title: Vision Capable
badgeInfo.vision.desc: This model can understand and analyze images. You can upload pictures and ask questions about them, or include images in your conversations.
badgeInfo.top.title: Top Tier Model
badgeInfo.top.desc: The most capable model from this provider. Best for complex reasoning, creative tasks, and when you need the highest quality responses.
badgeInfo.medium.title: Balanced Model
badgeInfo.medium.desc: A well-balanced model offering good performance at a reasonable cost. Great for everyday tasks and general conversations.
badgeInfo.fastest.title: Fastest Model
badgeInfo.fastest.desc: Optimized for speed and efficiency. Best for quick responses, simple tasks, and when low latency matters most.
badgeInfo.new.title: Newly Added
badgeInfo.new.desc: A recently added model to ClaraVerse. Try it out and explore its capabilities - it might become your new favorite!
modelSelector.title: Select a model
modelTooltip.unknownNotice: Structured outputs work but may have degraded performance. Full testing pending.
